resources.reason: Database recovery credential remains for the retained final snapshot.
CloudFormation creates a final database snapshot on standard stack deletion.
Digest-pinned appliance evidence is retained for explicit review and disposal.
Encrypted OAuth vault data is retained for explicit review and disposal.
Metadata-only audit records are retained for explicit review and disposal.
The retained appliance bucket keeps its deny-insecure-transport policy.
The retained vault bucket keeps its deny-insecure-transport policy.
The retained audit bucket keeps its deny-insecure-transport policy.
Undelivered audit metadata remains available for explicit review and disposal.
Failed audit metadata remains available for explicit review and disposal.
Seven-day operational logs remain until their configured expiration.
